overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person drive on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night. The scene features heavy fog, neon-lit billboards, futuristic architecture, and a pink-lit dashboard HUD while navigating through light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with metal sound barriers

agents.ego_description: driving at moderate speed around 60 km/h on the wet highway, maintaining center lane position

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall metal railing with horizontal bars running along the left side of the highway
tall metal railing with horizontal bars running along the right side of the highway
reflective yellow directional arrows indicating a curve in the road
large illuminated advertisement featuring a purple-tinted face on the right side
illuminated advertisement for a cola beverage with red and white coloring
metal highway sign structure spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night. Metal sound barriers line both sides of the road while yellow chevron signs indicate an upcoming curve. The vehicle maintains a steady speed around 60 km/h following a sedan ahead, passing illuminated billboards including a prominent purple face advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway section with paired billboards on both sides

events.description: vehicle slows down significantly from 60 km/h to 36 km/h
begins accelerating again, increasing speed from 36 km/h to 50 km/h

agents.ego_description: slowing down while driving past illuminated billboards on both sides of the highway, then accelerating

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'REAL WATER' in white text on the left side
large illuminated sign reading 'REAL WATER' in white text on the right side
second overhead highway sign structure spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows down significantly while passing through a section with matching 'REAL WATER' billboards on both sides of the highway. The speed drops to 36 km/h before accelerating again. The yellow chevron signs and purple face billboard pass out of view as the car continues through the foggy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with dense billboard advertising and distant city skyline

events.description: accelerating to high speed, reaching 86 km/h

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed past numerous illuminated advertisements with the city skyline visible in the distance

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement displaying '35.0' in large yellow text
political advertisement with 'VOTE' text and portrait
advertisement with 'HOT' text and food imagery
advertisement with 'XBD' text and futuristic graphics
futuristic skyscrapers and towers visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates to high speed, reaching 86 km/h while passing a dense corridor of illuminated billboards including advertisements for '35.0', 'VOTE', and 'HOT'. The distant city skyline becomes visible through the fog, with futuristic skyscrapers silhouetted against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit approach with overhead signage and urban buildings

events.description: slowing down from 88 km/h to 62 km/h as approaching highway exit
approaching exit ramp with overhead directional signage visible

agents.ego_description: reducing speed while approaching an exit interchange, steering slightly toward the exit lane

entered.detail: highway exit signage mounted on overhead gantry indicating exit directions
tall futuristic buildings and skyscrapers now visible closer on the left side
diverging road leading off the main highway
final overhead sign structure before the exit

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows down while approaching a highway exit, with overhead signage becoming visible. The city buildings that were distant are now prominent on the left side as the car nears the urban center. The speed decreases from 88 km/h to 62 km/h as the driver prepares to take the exit ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along a rain-soaked elevated highway that transitions from a steady cruise past neon advertisements to a slow glide through a mirrored corridor of billboards. It begins with the vehicle maintaining a steady speed, passing yellow chevron signs and a prominent purple face advertisement while following a sedan through the foggy night. As the car continues forward, the environment shifts into a symmetrical section of the highway lined with matching REAL WATER billboards on both sides. The vehicle slows significantly while passing through this illuminated stretch before accelerating once more. The scene finally opens back up as the previous signage fades into the distance and the car pushes further into the misty darkness.

The shot follows a high-speed drive through a neon-lit highway corridor that gradually transitions into a slower approach toward a dense urban center. It begins with the vehicle accelerating rapidly, rushing past a blur of illuminated billboards advertising 35.0, VOTE, and HOT while the distant city skyline looms through a thick fog. As the car maintains its momentum, the silhouetted futuristic skyscrapers shift from distant shapes to prominent structures flanking the left side of the road. The scene then shifts as the vehicle decelerates significantly, moving away from the open highway and toward overhead exit signage. Finally, the camera glides toward the highway ramp, bringing the towering architecture of the city center into sharp focus as the speed drops.
